name: Website Content Scraper and SEO Keyword Extractor
description: Scrapes a website URL with Firecrawl, extracts structured content and SEO keywords using Claude AI, researches keyword competition via Exa, and logs all results to a Google Sheet.

source.originalName: Website content scraper & SEO keyword extractor with GPT-5-mini and Airtable

firecrawlKey.description: Firecrawl connection key for web scraping

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for keyword research

targetUrl.description: Website URL to scrape and analyze for SEO keywords

spreadsheetId.description: Google Sheets spreadsheet ID to store keyword data

steps.name: Build Claude prompt for keyword extraction

code.source:
const md = ($.steps.scrapeWebsite.response.data || {}).markdown || '';
const url = $.input.targetUrl;

const prompt = 'You are an expert SEO analyst. Analyze this webpage content and extract all relevant SEO keywords.

URL: ' + url + '

CONTENT:
' + md.slice(0, 5000) + '

Extract keywords and return ONLY valid JSON:
{
  "pageTitle": "inferred page title",
  "metaDescription": "suggested meta description (under 160 chars)",
  "primaryKeyword": "main target keyword",
  "secondaryKeywords": ["kw1", "kw2", "kw3"],
  "longTailKeywords": ["long tail 1", "long tail 2"],
  "topicCluster": "main topic category",
  "contentType": "blog/product/landing/service/etc",
  "wordCount": 0,
  "readabilityScore": "easy/medium/hard",
  "keywordDensity": [{ "keyword": "word", "count": 0, "density": "0.0%" }],
  "missingKeywords": ["keywords the page should include but doesnt"],
  "recommendations": ["seo improvement suggestion 1"]
}';

return { prompt };

steps.name: Parse Claude output and strip fences
Build Exa query for keyword competition research
Append keyword data to Google Sheets
